'''Bog'Ruhx''' was a [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Dug/Legends|Dug]] and the head of the [[Ruhx clan]] on [[Malastare/Legends|Malastare]]. He posted a [[Bounty/Legends|bounty]] on the entire [[Bazurkah]] [[Bazurkah Clan|family]], in a consecutive process, after Bazurkah insulted his kin. When a bounty was also on his head, he was killed by the [[Bounty hunter/Legends|bounty hunter]] [[Jango Fett/Legends|Jango Fett]] who claimed the bounty.

{{Char-stub}}
